criteria.name: core_module_genericity
criteria.details: auto_fix, rollback, scoring, explanations, workflows, recovery modules avoid matrimony-only hardcoding

criteria.name: environment_portability
criteria.details: paths and output directories are config/env-driven in scripts/config.py

criteria.name: admin_api_ready_outputs
criteria.details: output/admin_reports and output/dashboard provide standardized JSON payloads

criteria.name: rollback_contract
criteria.details: row-level rollback manifests and execution utilities are table/primary-key generic
